suppress.notes: UI depends on firebase@10.x which currently pins undici@6.19.7. These advisories are temporarily suppressed while we schedule a Firebase major/minor update. Tracking task: Upgrade Firebase SDK and remove this suppression.
Temporary suppression for firebase-pinned undici@6.19.7. Remove after Firebase SDK upgrade.
Temporary suppression for firebase-pinned undici@6.19.7. Remove after Firebase SDK upgrade.
Safety-net suppression for firebase-pinned undici package while SDK upgrade is pending. This catches scanner outputs that omit GHSA names.
Temporary suppression for Vite advisory in CI while dependency updates propagate. Remove after upgrading Vite beyond 6.4.1 and regenerating lockfile.
Safety-net suppression for vite@6.4.1 while lockfile refresh is pending.
Temporary suppression for picomatch advisory inherited from build tool chain. Remove after lockfile updates to patched picomatch.
Safety-net suppression for picomatch@4.0.3 while lockfile refresh is pending.
